task_description: retrieve the current weather for London using a public API
code:
echo "Parsing weather data for London..."
curl -s "https://wttr.in/London?format=j1" | jq '.current_condition[0].temp_C + "°C, " + .current_condition[0].weatherDesc[0].value'

messages.content:
```bash
echo "Using curl to fetch weather data for London..."
curl -s "https://api.openweathermap.org/data/2.5/weather?q=London&appid=YOUR_API_KEY&units=metric"
```
